arts.ttl: Denis Law was Scottish football's first superstar but Man Utd 'gardener' nickname showed he was man of the people
arts.sum: Hugh Keevins paid tribute to the Scottish sporting icon after his passing on Friday

arts.ttl: Manchester United £150m transfer theory raised after spectacular Jude Bellingham claim
arts.sum: Real Madrid and England star Jude Bellingham was previously wanted by Man United before signing for Borussia Dortmund from Birmingham City in 2020.

arts.ttl: Confidence ‘growing considerably’ for club as they target Manchester United man – ‘Launched a second proposal’ for him
arts.sum: Real Betis have sent a second proposal to Manchester United over a loan deal for Antony this month. That’s according to Estadio Deportivo, who report that the Spanish side are confident they can get the ‘very complex operation’ over the line. arts.ttl: 'Free to leave' - Man United defender to depart Old Trafford this month?
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Tyrell Malacia is reportedly poised to leave Old Trafford on loan before the ongoing winter transfer window closes on February 3.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Man Utd need to change from being a ‘team of transition’
arts.sum: United host Brighton on Sunday aiming to capitalise on Thursday’s victory over Southampton.

arts.ttl: Denis Law was my neighbour and I popped round for Man Utd striker advice and coffee
arts.sum: Tributes have poured in from all over the football world for the Man United legend

arts.ttl: Manchester United confirm Old Trafford tribute for club legend Denis Law
arts.sum: Man United legend Denis Law passed away aged 84 on Friday and there are plans to pay tribute at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim makes Rasmus Hojlund feelings clear amid Man Utd star's ongoing goal drought
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund has struggled in front of goal for Manchester United this season but Ruben Amorim insists it is part of a collective problem rather than individual performances

arts.ttl: Joshua Zirkzee ban decision confirmed after lewd gesture in Man Utd win against Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United striker Joshua Zirkzee has escaped a ban by the FA following a controversial celebration during the Red Devils match against Southampton.

arts.ttl: Man Utd hopeful of Gyokeres deal - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United hopeful of signing Viktor Gyokeres, Arsenal interested in Norwegian teenager Sverre Nypan, Chelsea targeting Alejandro Garnacho for a January move, plus more.
